name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is located at 863 Oak St SW, Atlanta, GA 30310 in the West End neighborhood. Call +1 404-756-0101.
description_long: MoneyGram is a global money transfer and financial services company that has established a substantial presence in Atlanta through a network of agent locations rather than company-owned branches. The company operates by partnering with established retailers and check-cashing businesses to distribute its services across the city, with 42 documented search results in the Atlanta area alone. This partnership model allows MoneyGram to leverage existing storefronts and foot traffic from CVS pharmacies, Walmart locations, and independent check-cashing services like Ace Cash Express and Best Check Cash. MoneyGram's core service offering includes domestic and international money transfers, check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services—all accessible both online and through physical locations. The company distinguishes itself through the convenience of its agent network, operating locations with extended hours (many open until 8 PM-11 PM) and multiple locations throughout Atlanta's diverse neighborhoods, including service in areas like Southwest Atlanta, Northeast Atlanta, and the greater metro region. Partner locations include national retailers (CVS, Walmart) that provide convenient access during shopping trips, as well as specialized check-cashing services for consumers who may prefer dedicated financial service providers. An honest assessment reveals that while MoneyGram offers accessibility and convenience through its distributed network, consumers should be aware that the specific fees, transfer limits, and terms vary significantly by location type and partner agent—information not disclosed on the location-finder page. The reliance on third-party agents means service quality and customer experience may vary by location, and consumers may encounter different operational practices between a CVS kiosk and an independent check-cashing business.
pros: 42+ locations across Atlanta providing widespread geographic accessibility
Extended operating hours at many locations (open until 8 PM-11 PM)
Partnership with national retailers like CVS and Walmart for convenient access
Services available both online and offline through physical locations
Multiple neighborhood coverage including Southwest, Northeast, and greater metro Atlanta
Established brand with toll-free customer service line (800-746-7287)
Specialized independent check-cashing partners for dedicated financial service experience
cons: No fee information disclosed on location-finder page; fees vary by agent location
Service quality and consistency likely varies significantly between CVS kiosks, Walmart, and independent check-cashers
Limited transparency about transfer limits, transaction requirements, and terms at specific locations
Dependent on third-party agents means MoneyGram has less direct control over customer experience
No information provided about identity verification requirements or compliance procedures on the website
best_for: Customers seeking convenient money transfer services near shopping destinations (CVS, Walmart)
Individuals needing check cashing outside traditional banking hours
People in underserved neighborhoods without direct access to bank branches
Consumers requiring both domestic and international money transfer capabilities
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need quick access to money transfer, check cashing, or bill payment services and value proximity to existing retailers or check-cashing specialists over traditional bank branches. The primary caveat is that fees, limits, and service terms are agent-specific and not transparent on their website, requiring customers to contact individual locations for pricing details before transacting.
services: Cash pickup services at agent locations
